visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a grey newsboy cap, glasses, and a vibrant red T-shirt stands in front of a soft-lit indoor background. He speaks energetically toward the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize his points while brand logos and promotional text overlays decorate the frame. (2) The visual cuts to a bright studio-lit close-up of two Vivo smartphones, one purple and one pink, showcasing their screen displays and 5G branding. The background is slightly blurred, focusing entirely on the sleek design and colorful interfaces of the devices. (3) Scene transitions to night-time drone footage of the Tesla Diner in Los Angeles. The circular building features bright red neon strips and futuristic architecture, surrounded by a large parking lot illuminated by numerous white Tesla charging stalls and streetlights against a dark urban background. (4) Inside the diner, the camera captures a wide shot of a curved seating area with people dining at tables. The decor combines 1950s retro aesthetics with modern clean lines and white surfaces, creating a high-contrast environment with soft interior lighting and visible window views. (5) A digital graphic of the black and white Tesla Optimus robot appears, waving its robotic hand in a greeting motion. This is followed by high-quality product photos of classic diner food like golden french fries and crispy fried chicken, presented with US dollar price overlays.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可超很大! (2) [Slogan]: 特斯拉跨足餐飲. (3) [Variety]: 大搞. [Slogan]: 科技 x 復古. (4) [Slogan]: vivo Y100 5G. [Slogan]: V29 5G. [Variety]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (5) [Subtitle]: 位於洛杉磯的 Tesla Diner. [Slogan]: 擁有 80 個 V4 超充樁. (6) [Slogan]: 全球最大的一個超級充電站. (7) [Slogan]: 兩個巨型螢幕. (8) [Slogan]: 結合復古跟未來科技. (9) [Slogan]: 50 年代的美式風格. (10) [Slogan]: 未來的科技元素. (11) [Slogan]: Optimus 人形機器人. [Subtitle]: 請問需要什麼餐點呢? (12) [Slogan]: 價格很親民. (13) [Slogan]: US$4. [Slogan]: US$15. (14) [Slogan]: 自動扣款也 OK!. (15) [Slogan]: 特斯拉相關的周邊產品. (16) [Slogan]: 預計在全球大城市開設更多分店. [Variety]: 你會想去嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator host, approximately 7 people visible inside the diner background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a bright red short-sleeved t-shirt with a small graphic. He wears a green beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a neutral studio wall. Secondary background includes the exterior of the Tesla Diner in Los Angeles with neon lights and a parking lot filled with Tesla Superchargers. Interior backgrounds show a retro-themed American diner with white counters and black leather booths.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male speaker delivering a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting over an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop background music. The speech rate is fast and professional, with clear articulation and minimal background noise, suggesting a high-quality studio recording environment. (2) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect marks a transition between visual scenes, while the speaker continues his narration with consistent volume and arousal. The background music maintains a steady electronic beat with synthesizer textures, providing a lively and optimistic atmosphere throughout the segment. (3) As text graphics appear on screen, short "ding" and "pop" sound effects are strategically placed to draw auditory attention to the information. The speaker's intonation is dynamic, frequently using rising contours to maintain viewer engagement while describing the features of the new restaurant. (4) The track concludes with the speaker posing a question, accompanied by a slight swell in the background music's intensity. The final seconds feature a clean fade-out of the music and vocals, with no detectable technical distortions or significant environmental interference, maintaining a high signal-to-noise ratio.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Inventory -> Social Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about Tesla's expansion into the restaurant industry with its diner in Los Angeles while cross-promoting a mobile phone retail chain 'miko' and new Vivo smartphone models.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Visual display of vivo smartphones and 'miko' brand logo, accompanied by a verbal recommendation to buy phones at 'miko'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density information delivery style typical of social media tech influencers, blending current news with commercial sponsorships.
